hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); r=json.dumps({'systemMessage':'\u26a0\ufe0f SOLUTION.md updated \u2014 also update SOLUTION.html changelog section.'}) if 'SOLUTION.md' in fp and not 'SOLUTION.html' in fp else ''; print(r) if r else None" 2>NUL || true
